name: Aroma Golf Range
about: Aroma Spa & Sports is a sophisticated health and wellness center in Los Angeles that integrates a state-of-the-art golf facility with a luxury spa and fitness amenities. The venue offers a four-level, semi-indoor golf driving range alongside comprehensive spa services, a Jr. Olympic-size indoor swimming pool, and group fitness classes. It operates under a membership-based model, providing access to its facilities including the driving range, sauna, swimming pool, and workout areas.
why_golfers_like_it: Four-level, semi-indoor golf driving range offering a premium all-weather experience
State-of-the-art facilities with advanced personal fitness trainers and modern workout stations
Membership includes 20% discount on driving range fees for frequent players

food_and_drink.notes: On-site dining establishments offering fine Asian cuisine, Starbucks coffee shop, and a sports bar
Full bar service available at the on-site establishments

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides bath robes, workout shirts, and shorts, but it is not explicitly stated whether golf clubs are provided.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has on-site dining establishments offering Asian cuisine, a Starbucks coffee shop, and a sports bar, making outside food unnecessary.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: Information about 18-hole simulator play duration is not provided on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly, offering family days on the 2nd and 4th Sundays of each month with special pricing for children.
